rationale: Educ. Code §37.221 governs periodic review of school facility safety standards and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemption amounts. No statutory or operational conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 37.221. FACILITIES STANDARDS REVIEW. (a) At least once every five years, the center shall review the facilities standards for instructional facilities adopted under Section 7.061 and make recommendations to the commissioner regarding any changes necessary to ensure that the facilities standards:
_note: Rule text addresses school facility safety standards review; proposed change concerns Tax Code homestead exemption amount. No overlap.
